title: Stomach pain in the elderly: 11 herbal teas for quick relief
description: Zingiber officinale teas, also known as ginger tea, have been used for centuries to help alleviate stomach pain. This is due to the presence of compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce pain and swelling in the digestive tract. The active constituent, gingerol, also has a natural digestive enzyme called zingibain that helps break down proteins and aid digestion. When consumed as a tea, ginger's properties can help soothe the stomach a...
